title: Water and the environment - Canada.ca
content:
## Water and the environment
Water quantity, freshwater quality, cleaning up our lakes and rivers, water science, sustainability indicators, marine water quality, protecting water.

## Services and information

### Water level and flow data
Real-time data, historical, station and network data, tools, downloads, partners, resources.

### Water sustainability indicators
Quantity, availability, quality, phosphorus, nutrients, land use impact, harmful substances.

### Cleaning up lakes and rivers
Lake Winnipeg, Great Lakes, St. Lawrence Action Plan, funding, partnerships.

### Freshwater quality monitoring
Environmental monitoring, assessment and reporting on aquatic ecosystems status and trends.

### Protecting freshwater
Reporting under the regulations, wastewater pollution, data and annual reports.
Conservation targets, bioregions and protected areas, Ocean Plastics Charter, Oceans Youth Innovation Challenge, Coastal Restoration Fund.
Nutrients, pesticides, metals and other toxic substances, substances of emerging concern.
Overview of Canada's water resources, longest rivers, largest lakes, measuring water in lakes and rivers.
Water levels, floods, hydrometric data, water availability, Water Survey of Canada.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
